Seo.siteTitle: Lorenzo Oliva — Full Stack Web Developer & Artist
Seo.siteDescription: Lorenzo Oliva, full stack web developer (React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript) and artist. Portfolio of development projects and artworks.
Seo.ogImageAlt: Lorenzo Oliva — Full Stack Web Developer & Artist

Layout.footerLabel1: No part of this site or its content may be reproduced, copied, modified, or adapted without the written permission of the rightful owner.

Home.presentationTxt1: I am a web developer specializing in frontend, an artist, with experience in decoration and the use of digital graphic software. I graduated from art school and made several approaches to the tech world, until in 2024 I started my training in development.
Home.presentationTxt2: From this webpage, you have access to my two worlds: art and development.
Home.modalHelloLabel: Hi, I’m Lorenzo, nice to meet you!

ArtSection.galleryLead: My work centres on painting — mainly oil and mixed media — through which I explore the human soul, nature, time and existence, with an evocative use of colour and light.
ArtSection.galleryStatement: In my view, art should not stop at mere representation but portray the essence of its creator, reconciling ethics with aesthetics. Drawing on all my knowledge, through painting I lay out my thought: not concise stories, but universal concepts rooted in my vision of human life. My aim is to look towards the future of art with works turned to the contemporary, while following in the footsteps of the past. Every work is like a dream through which the artist reveals himself.

DevSection.followCode: Visit my GitHub profile and view the code
DevSection.followProject: Follow the link and try the project
